channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James will sit out the Lakers' game against Indiana to rest his sore left ankle
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is sitting out the Los Angeles Lakers ' game against Indiana on Saturday to rest his sore left ankle. The Lakers announced the decision about four hours before they hosted the Pacers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ahead of Real Madrid clash, Man City given a scare by third-tier Leyton Orient in the FA Cup
item.description: Ahead of a Champions League playoff against Real Madrid, Manchester City survived a scare at third-tier Leyton Orient to advance to the fifth round of the FA Cup. City hosts Madrid on Tuesday in the first of a two-legged playoff.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL great Lawrence Taylor recalls stern warning he gave Joe Montana during testy confrontation
item.description: NFL legend Lawrence Taylor told an incredible story about warning quarterback Joe Montana, during an appearance on OutKick's "The Ricky Cobb Show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The NFL’s postseason schedule is a big problem for the College Football Playoff that could get much worse
item.description: If Roger Goodell gets his way and the NFL adds an 18th game, the College Football Playoff could be relegated to the back burner in January.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Eagles-Chiefs Super Bowl is a matchup of some of the brightest and oldest minds in the NFL
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Andy Reid and Matt Nagy vs. Vic Fangio. Nick Sirianni and Kellen Moore vs. Steve Spagnuolo. This Super Bowl is a matchup of some of the brightest — and oldest — minds in the NFL. Reid and Fangio are 66. Spagnuolo is 65.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stunner! California routs De La Salle behind hot second-half shooting
item.description: Senior Dane Wallace scored 23 points to lead California to just its second victory over De La Salle in two decades.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: US skier Breezy Johnson marks return from 14-month ban with a gold in world championship downhill
item.description: American skier Breezy Johnson has won gold in the women’s downhill at the Alpine skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Devin Booker's 47 points leads Suns past Jazz in OT
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored a season-high 47 points, Grayson Allen hit a 3-pointer at the buzzer to force overtime and the short-handed Phoenix Suns rallied to beat the Utah Jazz 135-127 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The Suns' Big 3 is still together after the trade deadline, so the search for success continues
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal are still members of the Phoenix Suns after a tumultuous trade deadline. Now they have roughly 30 games to turn around their disappointing season. The problem is there aren't many reasons to believe that's going to happen.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Puka Nacua 'hoping for the best' after Cooper Kupp said Rams will try to trade him
item.description: The end of an era for the Los Angeles Rams seems to be nearing, and Puka Nacua praised Cooper Kupp in recently speaking with Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl prices are down this year. StubHub explains why
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — If you’re still planning to attend the Super Bowl on Sunday, you can expect a price drop compared to last year. The entry-level price for a ticket is currently around $2,600 according to StubHub.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Chiefs, Eagles players with ties to San Diego area
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday is sure to be a fun one as the Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs battle it out for the Vince Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Walz's home state joins California in ignoring Trump's executive order to ban transgenders from girls sports
item.description: Minnesota's governing body for high school sports says it will continue to allow transgender athletes to compete in prep athletics despite President Trump's executive order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Anthony Davis is set for his Mavs debut and understands the ire of fans who lost Luka Doncic
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis expects to make his debut for the Dallas Mavericks in their first home game since the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods to play at Torrey Pines, his first PGA Tour event since July
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Tiger Woods committed Friday to playing the Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines, returning to one of his favorite venues for his first PGA Tour start since the British Open last July.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UMass will pay student who made half-court $10,000 after insurance company said his foot was on line
item.description: A UMass student who made a half-court shot during a women’s basketball game halftime promotion will get his $10,000 prize from the school itself after the insurance company refused to pay because, it said, his foot was on the line.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Spring training preview: Dodgers are favored to be MLB's first repeat champion in a quarter-century
item.description: Miguel Rojas gladly gave up his No. 11 to Roki Sasaki and went back to 72, his jersey as a Los Angeles Dodgers rookie in 2014. “I'm not asking for anything. I have everything that I want in life,” the 35-year-old infielder said. "All I ask for him is trying to get us another championship.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NCAA changes participation policy on transgender athletes
item.description: The NCAA has changed its participation policy for athletes, keeping transgender students from women's sports
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Penguins at the Birch Aquarium make their Super Bowl predictions
item.description: Some penguins at the Birch Aquarium at University of California, San Diego's Scripps Institution of Oceanography made their bets on which team will win the big game on Super Bowl Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Three UPenn teammates of Lia Thomas sue university
item.description: Three former teammates of transgender swimmer Lia Thomas sued the University of Pennsylvania over rights violations
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: McDavid makes perfect pass in overtime as the Oilers beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor McDavid set up Zach Hyman in overtime, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Wednesday night. Hyman redirected McDavid's pass for the power-play goal at 1:36. It was Hyman's 19th goal and McDavid's 49th assist of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Edwards scores 49 to lead Wolves over short-handed Bulls 127-108
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 49 points, including 20 in the third quarter, as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the short-handed Chicago Bulls 127-108 on Wednesday night. Edwards hit six 3-pointers and was 17 of 18 from the free-throw line and also added nine rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Sick kids experience Super Bowl via innovative tech
item.description: Pediatric patients are able to control these robots, allowing them to participate in various Super Bowl events remotely.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, NewsNation

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Artist explains how New Orleans childhood inspired Super Bowl logo
item.description: Months before the Chiefs and Eagles earned a ticket to Super Bowl LIX, the NFL design team asked Tajh to create both theme art and the logo for Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Amy Russo, NewsNation

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former NFL player Rashard Cook looks to shape next generation at Mater Dei
item.description: "We had great experiences past high school, and I want to recreate that for the guys that want that experience.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears GM Ryan Poles expected to receive 3-year contract extension, according to team source
item.description: The Bears are expected to extend general manager Ryan Poles' contract for three more years, in order to align it with the contract signed by new head coach Ben Johnson, according to a feature story this week by ESPN Bears reporter Courtney Cronin. Cronin published a feature story Monday at ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
